title: JustLend DAO contracts.json
description: Machine-readable contract directory for the JustLend DAO protocol on TRON. Records every JustLend contract on TRON Mainnet and Nile testnet in three equivalent address formats (Base58, EVM 0x-hex, TRON 41-hex) so consumers can use whichever their tooling expects without round-tripping through encoders.

networks.description: Map of TRON network → category → contract records. `mainnet` is required; `nile` is optional but recommended for testnet integrations.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this document's shape. Pin a MAJOR.

base58.description: Human description of when to use the Base58 form.

hex_evm.description: Human description of when to use the EVM 0x form.

hex_tron.description: Human description of when to use the TRON 41 form.

address.description: A TRON address in all three equivalent encodings.

base58.description: Base58Check, T-prefixed, 34 chars. Used by wallets, Tronscan, TronWeb display, end-user prompts.

hex_evm.description: EVM-style 0x-prefixed hex of the 20-byte address body. For cross-chain bridges, EVM-side tooling, Etherscan-like indexers.

hex_tron.description: TRON-internal 41-prefixed hex (21 bytes = 0x41 + EVM addr). For TronGrid / TronWeb low-level APIs.

contract_record.description: A single deployed contract on a TRON network.

underlying_record.description: The underlying asset of a jToken market. Either a TRC20 (`address` present) or the native TRX (`address` absent, `note` present).

note.description: Free text explaining oddities — e.g. native TRX having no TRC20 contract.

jtoken_record.description: One JustLend jToken market: the delegator entrypoint (CErc20Delegator), its underlying TRC20 (or native TRX), and the optional delegate implementation.

status.description: `active` = open for new supply/borrow. `legacy` = closed to new supply/borrow but still queryable for existing positions to unwind.

decimals.description: jToken decimals. **Always 8** for every Compound V2 jToken regardless of the underlying.

underlying_decimals.description: Underlying token's decimals. TRX = 6, USDT/USDC/TUSD = 6, BTC/WBTC = 8, ETH/USDD = 18.

delegate.description: The CErc20Delegate implementation behind the delegator. Optional; some delegators point at a shared/inline implementation.

delegate_implementation.description: Legacy alias for `delegate`. Either key may appear in older generations of this file.

network.description: A single TRON network's contract catalog. All `*` keys are optional — Nile testnet for example does not yet expose `price_oracle` or `interest_rate_models`.

governance.description: GovernorBravo delegator + delegate, Timelock, JST token, WJST voting wrapper.

strx.description: Liquid-staking sTRX contract (and proxy on Nile).

jtokens.description: Per-market jToken records, keyed by jToken symbol. Mainnet exposes 17 active + 6 legacy = 23 markets.

interest_rate_models.description: Per-deployment immutable interest-rate model contracts. Keyed by model name (e.g. `WhitePaperModelTRX`, `jumpRateUSDT`).

note.description: Free-text caveat about this network — e.g. testnet status, parity vs Mainnet.
